overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character running through a desert canyon at night. The character navigates rocky terrain, takes damage while climbing a steep section, and engages in combat aiming at distant targets. A small creature companion follows the character throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the narrow canyon path following the winding terrain

notable_agents.action: small creature companion running behind the character

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall with rough texture forming the left boundary
steep rock face forming the right side of the canyon passage
sandy and rocky ground surface of the canyon floor
faint light source visible at the end of the canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow desert canyon at night, flanked by tall rock walls on both sides. The ground is sandy with scattered rocks, and a faint light glows in the distance. A small creature companion follows closely behind.

events.description: character takes damage indicated by red screen flash and health warning
character transitions from running to climbing up steep rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing up a steep rock slope while taking damage, scrambling over boulders

notable_agents.action: small creature companion climbing up the rocks behind the character

entered.detail: vertical rock face requiring climbing to ascend
narrow ledge providing footing on the steep incline
scattered large boulders on the steep slope

segments.scene_description: The character encounters a steep rocky incline and begins climbing while taking damage from an unseen source. The canyon walls shift position as the character ascends the boulder field, with the right wall moving closer and the left wall receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider canyon floor with natural rock formations

events.description: character draws weapon and continues running through the canyon

agents.ego_description: running through the wider canyon section with weapon drawn, scanning the area

notable_agents.action: small creature companion running alongside on the sandy ground

entered.detail: wider sandy area of the canyon floor with more open space
large rock formation creating an archway in the distance
large rocks scattered across the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: After climbing the steep section, the character emerges into a wider canyon area with open ground and scattered boulders. A natural rock arch is visible in the distance. The character draws a weapon and continues running while the canyon walls return to their flanking positions.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon approach to open area with distant rock pillars

events.description: character aims weapon at distant targets marked by red indicators

agents.ego_description: aiming weapon at distant targets while continuing to move forward through the canyon

notable_agents.action: small creature companion following behind as the character aims

entered.detail: tall vertical rock formations visible in the far distance
massive rock structures lining the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the canyon and begins aiming at distant targets. Tall rock pillars and formations become visible at the canyon's end. The scattered boulders shift to the left as the character advances toward the open area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon at night that gradually opens into a wide expanse of towering rock formations. It begins with the character and a small creature companion running between tall, flanking rock walls toward a faint distant glow. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character up a steep, boulder-strewn incline where the walls diverge and close in during a difficult ascent. The scene then expands into a wider canyon area featuring a natural rock arch, where the character draws a weapon and regains a steady pace. Finally, the camera advances toward the canyon's end, passing shifting boulders and tall rock pillars as the character aims at distant targets in the opening landscape.
